creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Nathan Whitehorn from comment #2)

At llvm.org I've submitted:

Bug 26519 - Clang 3.8.0's "Target: powerpc-unknown-freebsd11.0" code generation is violating the ABI involved

I'd still like to be able to add specific ABI documentation references. I've listed you as the source of my hear-say about the ABI status.

I left its priority at "normal", not "release blocker". Is 3.8.0 already released so "too late now"? But the setting might need to be changed.
